prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2023年最低位次约69名，2024年约78名，2025年约47名。近三年位次波动较大，2024年较2023年后移9名，2025年则大幅前移31名，竞争显著加剧；2025年基准位 次约47名；本省理科计划2023年27人、2024年27人、2025年32人，2026年计划32人，与2025年持平，扩招趋势暂停，对竞争格局无额外缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 985、211、双一流；软科中国大学排名连续多年第1名（2021-2026年均第1），为全国最高层次学府，对考生吸引力极强；2026年声誉评价偏负面， 涉及校园管理、食堂等舆情事件，但抖音热度排名总榜第2（高热），短视频曝光量极大，报考关注度持续高涨；2025年声誉中性/混合，未见明显投档断档记录；清华大学拥有A+学科超20个，包括计算机科学与技术、控制科学与工程、机械工程、材料科学与工程、土木工程、建筑学、电气工程、力学、动力工程及工程热物理、化学、生 物学、环境科学与工程、管理科学与工程、软件工程、马克思主义理论等，学科实力全国顶尖，对高分考生吸引力极强。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、电子信息/通信、电 气工程等清华优势专业大类持续高热推荐，社会热度高；本省2026年考生总数约23.8万人（较2025年约7.65万人大幅增长约211%），竞争基数急剧扩大，虽清华位次已极靠前，但 考生规模膨胀仍对竞争产生推升作用；清华大学位于北京，在新疆招生占比极小 （2023-2025年均为约9人左右），属跨省招生，本省考生报考需与全国顶尖考生竞争，地域偏好因素不显著。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅前移的强势走势、2026年招生 计划持平、本省考生总数大幅增长（竞争基数扩大约3倍）、清华抖音高热持续吸引关注、声誉偏负面但影响有限等因素，预计2026年理科最低位次在2025年47名基础上继续小幅 前移（竞争略加剧）。预测最低位次约44名，区间38-50名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: In 2023, the minimum ranking was approximately 69th; in 2024, approximately 78th; in 2025, approximately 47th. Rankings fluctuated significantly over the past three years, with a 9-place drop in 2024 compared to 2023, followed by a sharp 31-place rise in 2025, indicating intensified competition. The baseline ranking for 2025 is approximately 47th. The provincial science enrollment plan was 27 in 2023, 27 in 2024, 32 in 2025, and 32 in 2026, unchanged from 2025, with the expansion trend paused, providing no additional relief to the competitive landscape.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 1st in the Soft Science China University Rankings for multiple consecutive years (1st from 2021 to 2026), making it the highest-level institution nationwide, with extremely strong appeal to candidates. In 2026, reputation evaluation is somewhat negative, involving campus management, cafeteria incidents, etc., but Douyin (TikTok) popularity ranks 2nd overall (high heat), with massive short video exposure, keeping application attention consistently high. In 2025, reputation is neutral/mixed, with no obvious record of enrollment gaps. Tsinghua University has over 20 A+ disciplines, including Computer Science and Technology, Control Science and Engineering, Mechanical Engineering, Materials Science and Engineering, Civil Engineering, Architecture, Electrical Engineering, Mechanics, Power Engineering and Engineering Thermophysics, Chemistry, Biology, Environmental Science and Engineering, Management Science and Engineering, Software Engineering, Marxist Theory, etc., with top-tier academic strength nationwide, strongly attracting high-scoring candidates.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Computer Science, Electronic Information/Communication, Electrical Engineering, and other advantageous major categories at Tsinghua continue to be highly recommended, with high social popularity. In 2026, the total number of candidates in the province is approximately 238,000 (a sharp increase of about 211% compared to approximately 76,500 in 2025), dramatically expanding the competition base. Although Tsinghua's ranking is already extremely high, the expansion of the candidate pool still exerts upward pressure on competition. Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, with a very small enrollment share in Xinjiang (approximately 9 people each year from 2023 to 2025), making it a cross-provincial enrollment. Candidates from this province must compete with top candidates nationwide, and regional preference factors are not significant.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the strong upward trend of rankings in 2025, the unchanged enrollment plan for 2026, the significant increase in the total number of candidates in the province (competition base expanded by about 3 times), Tsinghua's sustained high popularity on Douyin attracting attention, and the limited impact of negative reputation, it is predicted that the minimum ranking for science in 2026 will continue to move slightly upward from the 2025 ranking of 47 (competition slightly intensifies). The predicted minimum ranking is approximately 44th, with a range of 38-50.

- Science Experimental Class (Xinya College)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Wuqiong College) (Artificial Intelligence, etc.)

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easier to Enter)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Intelligent Manufacturing and Equipment) (Mechanical Engineering, Vehicle Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Xiuzhong College) (Cross-Disciplinary Engineering)
- Engineering Experimental Class (Ziqiang College) (Cross-Disciplinary Engineering)
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: Predicted ranking approximately 44th, range 38-50. If ranking is within the range, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 as the main, Tier 1 as a reach, and Tier 3 as a safety. If ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<38), focus on reaching for Tier 1 flagship majors (Computer Science, Clinical Medicine PUMC). If ranking is near the upper limit (around 50), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3, supplemented by Tier 2.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: The minimum ranking in 2024 was approximately 23rd, and in 2025 it was about 1st (1st in the province). In 2025, the ranking moved significantly forward by 22 places, competition sharply intensified, reaching the top level of the province; the provincial liberal arts enrollment plan was 2 students in 2024, 2 students in 2025, and 2 students in 2026, remaining unchanged for three consecutive years, with no expansion to alleviate competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: 985, 211, Double First-Class; ranked 1st nationally by Soft Science, the highest-level institution in the country; in 2026, reputation evaluation is slightly negative, but Douyin popularity ranks 2nd overall (high heat), with extremely high application attention; in 2025, reputation is neutral/mixed; Tsinghua University's liberal arts advantageous disciplines include Law A+, Business Administration A+, Applied Economics A, Sociology A-, Chinese Language and Literature A-, Journalism and Communication A, etc., with equally top-tier liberal arts strength.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text:
Liberal arts majors such as Law, Chinese Language/Literature have socially hot recommendations; the total number of examinees in the province in 2026 is approximately 238,000 (a significant increase from about 76,500 in 2025), with liberal arts examinees estimated at about 75,000 based on historical proportions, significantly expanding the competition base.
7. [Regional Factor] Tsinghua University is located in Beijing, recruiting only 2 liberal arts students in Xinjiang, a very small-scale cross-provincial enrollment, making competition extremely fierce.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering factors such as the ranking reaching 1st in the province in 2025, the enrollment plan remaining unchanged for three consecutive years, a significant increase in the total number of examinees in the province (expanding the competition base), and the sustained high popularity of the Tsinghua brand, the 1st place in 2025 has peaked, making it difficult to move further forward in 2026. It is expected to slightly move back to about 3rd place. The predicted minimum ranking is about 3rd, with a range of 1-8.
